reviews.comment:
Momentáneamente el bar/restaurante se encuentra en obra, espero que vuelvan los sándwich 😂
Los baños y la carga de combustible funcionan normal

(Translated by Google)
The bar/restaurant is currently under construction; I hope the sandwiches will be back soon 😂
The restrooms and fuel station are operating normally.

reviews.comment:
Histórica YPF del ACA. Es un clásico pero tarda demasiado la remodelación del local por lo que no tenes nada para comprar. Solo cargar combustible y los baños que están siempre limpios. El agua para el mate es gratis.

(Translated by Google)
The historic YPF station at the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina). It's a classic, but the renovations are taking too long, so there's nothing to buy. You can only fill up your tank and use the restrooms, which are always clean. Hot water for mate (a traditional South American infused drink) is free.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xkdE1HeE5SbDlIZVhWMlZrMVRWa2Q2YUZwbVJsRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pasé cerca de las 22 hs, y lamentablemente no puedo calificar el lugar porque estaba cerrado, no así la Shell que está enfrente, y dónde había mucho movimiento de gente en el shop y cargando combustible.

(Translated by Google)
I passed by around 10 pm, and unfortunately I can't rate the place because it was closed, unlike the Shell station across the street, where there was a lot of activity in the shop and people filling up their tanks.

reviews.comment:
OCT 2025.
Buena atención!! Aunque el Shop y el patio del camping está cerrado (mantenimiento) me dejaron hacer noche! Gracias por prensar en los viajeros!

(Translated by Google)
October 2025.
Great service!! Even though the shop and the campground patio were closed (for maintenance), they let me stay overnight! Thank you for thinking of travelers!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tvM1kzVXRiRGxYVmtweExUZFpTVEJuUTJGSlMyYxAB

reviews.comment:
BUEN SERVICIO. BAÑOS EXCELENTES CONDICIONES LIMPIOS AGUA CALKENTE GRATIS PARA EL MATE. NO TIENE SHOP24HS LO UNICO

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Excellent, clean bathrooms. Free hot water for mate. The only downside is the lack of a 24-hour shop.
